candidate: Prioritize ready-node denial over generic source final-response denial in AO Mission final-synthesis readbacks, and add a ready-node denial fixture.
rejected_candidates: Only add documentation; rejected because the readback builder was losing the actionable return gate.
Change AO Mission final synthesis output; rejected because node 27 owns Atlas prompt/readback quality only.
Allow final response when source status is blocked; rejected because ready nodes remain.
decision: Atlas readbacks must carry blocked_ready_nodes_remain when ready nodes exist, even if the source final synthesis already denied final response.
